contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 30
- Description: Capoeira platform — Add TransferWise transfer fees to transparency
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/capoeira/pull/5
  
  Details:
  Updated transparency page to include TransferWise transfer fees alongside Stripe fees for accurate donation fee breakdown
  
  Changes:
  - Updated fee calculation to include both Stripe and Wise fees:
    * Stripe: 2.9% + $0.30 (unchanged)
    * Wise: 0.5% + $1.50 (typical for Brazil transfers)
  - Updated flow description to mention Wise transfers to Brazil
  - Updated example calculation table to show fee breakdown:
    * Stripe fee
    * Net after Stripe
    * Wise transfer fee
    * Final net to Tribo Bahia Mirim
  - Updated all metadata to mention both fee types
  
  Benefits:
  ✅ More accurate fee breakdown for donors
  ✅ Realistic net amount shown (46.51 vs 48.25 for $50 donation)
  ✅ Transparency about all deduction types
  ✅ Updated flow description to match actual payment process
  
  Technical Details:
  stripeFee = amount × 0.029 + $0.30
  afterStripe = amount - stripeFee
  wiseFee = afterStripe × 0.005 + $1.50
  net = afterStripe - wiseFee
  
  GitHub:
  https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/capoeira/pull/5
  
  This provides more accurate transparency about total deductions from donations, showing donors exactly how much reaches the program.
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 50.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
